{{Quote|The Nivek Shadowmen are hiding Confederacy weapons on the planet and they'll do anything to protect them.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Nivek]]|<ref name="Blind Force">{{CWACite|1|Blind Force}}</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Nivek''' was an assignment to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nivek]] undertaken by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The mission==
The [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], believing the native [[Shadowman|Shadowmen]] were hiding [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] weapons on their homeworld, dispatched Kenobi and Skywalker to investigate. Upon arrival on the so-called 'night planet', the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] found themselves plunged into darkness. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] had feared that such a place would be perfect for an ambush, and he was proved right when swarms of Shadowmen warriors attacked the two Jedi. Using a variety of weapons, including [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blasters]], the Shadowmen almost overwhelmed the two Jedi.

Using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], the Jedi were able to defend themselves and found their way to a secret Separatist base. Relying entirely on their Jedi senses, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] staged a hasty assault on the foundry, cutting down several [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] as they ascended the steps to the main entrance. Skywalker planted a charge in the base, and the two Jedi fled before the entire facility was consumed by the resulting explosion.

==Appearances==
